title: Zoro Takes Up His Swords
description: On pages 16–19, this part pushes the Shells Town conflict forward as Luffy challenges the fear surrounding Morgan’s Marines.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Um...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Sorry.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Seize him!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Seize him! I'll have his heart!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Aye Aye, sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: DADDY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: THAT'S THE RIFFIAN WHO HIIT ME! IF YOU HAD KILLED HIM THIS WOULD NEVER HAVE--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'VE BEEN LOOKING FOR YOU!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: L-Let me go! Father! Help!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He's entering the fortress!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: HELP ME!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: GET HIM!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: CAPTAIN! SOMEONE'S IN THE PARADE GROUND!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WHAT!!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ALL THESE REBELS DEFYING ME! KILL 'EMALL!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WHAT!? Luffy went into the for- trees!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Why is he so reckon!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YEAH, I'VE NOTICED. WHO IS HE ANYWAY?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey! Now YOU'RE being reckless! If they catch you freeing me, they'll kill you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: THEY IMPRISONED YOU unfairly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I can't stand to see the Navy Act 1 (2002)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to become a proper sailor! Just like Luffy's going to be the King of the Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WHAT!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: KING OF THE PIRATES!? DOES HE KNOW WHAT THAT MEANS!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: HA HA... I WAS SHOCKED WHEN HE FIRST TOLD ME, TOO.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But he'll succeed or die trying! That's how he is!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THERE HE IS! GET HIM!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WHERE ARE ZOLO'S SWORDS!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I-I'll tell you! Just stop dragging me!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Have you mastered the basics of the skull and crossbones? Next, we'll show you how to create your own original designs!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ALVIDA'S FLAG In profile with a heart symbol.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: SHANKS' FLAG Add three scars on the left eye and replace the cross- bones with swords.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: LUFFY'S FLAG just add a straw hat!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If you like baseball you can do something like this!

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
